rule.description: Critical Severity - Sensitive monitored file modified on Ubuntu endpoint

full_log:
File '/opt/wazuh-watch/critical_file.txt' modified
Mode: realtime
Changed attributes: size,permission,mtime,md5,sha1,sha256
Size changed from '165' to '264'
Permissions changed from 'rw-r--r--' to 'rw-------'
Old modification time was: '1774952247', now it is '1774952921'
Old md5sum was: 'f601c4fe08b4f794e4785c5c64aebe8a'
New md5sum is : '9ec63e2fed1f88619bdef43159811af0'
Old sha1sum was: 'a6e03ae446b075009cf7335dd2109c06ccf10cae'
New sha1sum is : '7f8083269e8b817ccbcb5499c52790ffbcdd6288'
Old sha256sum was: '62e3fd8e00a5664b82ef13dbbe96d6e67adc9377a2cd6a8787781531cb9d9485'
New sha256sum is : 'ed2eba34edd627b7c1f4138f4fa2db6097da05229879407d00da2fa2e39d4cb7'
